overall.description: A static shot of an ornate stone fireplace flanked by large lion statues in a gothic interior, with a fire burning steadily. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine, featuring detailed stone textures and dynamic fire lighting effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with monumental fireplace

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand gothic fireplace hall, dominated by a large stone fireplace with burning fire and flanked by two massive lion statues. The stone architecture features pointed arches and heavy masonry, with an arched window visible to the left and a doorway to the right. The scene remains unchanged throughout with only the fire showing movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze upon a grand gothic fireplace hall where the only movement is the flickering of a central fire. It begins with a wide view of the heavy masonry and pointed arches that define the room's imposing architecture. As the camera lingers, the dynamic light from the burning hearth casts shifting shadows across the two massive lion statues flanking the stone mantle. The scene remains focused on this symmetrical composition, capturing the stillness of the arched window and adjacent doorway while the flames continue to dance.
